instructions.instruction: Pick up the wei-chuan orange juice in the shopping basket and place it on the shelf with right arm, straighten the overturned wei-chuan grape juice with right arm.

subtask_steps.instruction: Pick up the wei-chuan orange juice in the shopping basket with the right arm.
Place the wei-chuan orange juice on the shelf with the right arm.
Straighten the overturned wei-chuan grape juice with the right arm.
